# opnsense_quagga_bfd_neighbor (Data Source)

Configure BFD neighbors.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID of the resource.

### Read-Only

- `address` (String) The IPv4 or IPv6 address of the BFD neighbor.
- `description` (String) An optional description for this BFD neighbor.
- `detect_multiplier` (Number) The detection multiplier.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable this BFD neighbor.
- `interface_name` (String) The interface used for the BFD session.
- `local_address` (String) The local address used for the BFD session.
- `multi_hop` (Boolean) Enable multi-hop BFD.
- `receive_interval` (Number) The minimum receive interval in milliseconds.
- `transmit_interval` (Number) The minimum transmit interval in milliseconds.
